ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: De Medendis Humani Corporis Malis: Ars Medica.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Habentur in secunda parte omens ij morbi, qui in prima deerant.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This text contains manuscript notes in Italian and Latin on Altomare and some Neapolitan scientists. See also M. Leonardo Fioravanti, De Capricci Medicinali, Venetia, 1565, pp. 24.25.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
